mapper.select: SELECT * FROM stock_alert WHERE is_read = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM stock_alert ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 50
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_alert (type, ref_id, ref_name, current_qty, threshold, message, is_read) VALUES (#{type}, #{refId}, #{refName}, #{currentQty}, #{threshold}, #{message}, #{isRead})
mapper.update: UPDATE stock_alert SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE stock_alert SET is_read = 1 WHERE is_read = 0
